headline: LASIK Eye Surgery in Chennai
subheadline: AIIMS-trained ophthalmologist Dr. Rajeswari offers safe, evidence-based LASIK evaluation and treatment in KK Nagar, Chennai. No unnecessary procedures -- only what's clinically right for you.
metaDescription: LASIK eye surgery consultation in KK Nagar, Chennai with AIIMS-trained Dr. Rajeswari. Evidence-based evaluation, no unnecessary procedures. Call or book online.
symptoms: Dependent on glasses or contact lenses
Active lifestyle or sports requiring glasses-free vision

processSteps.title: Comprehensive Evaluation
processSteps.description: Detailed corneal mapping and eye health assessment to confirm you're a safe candidate.

processSteps.title: Honest Discussion
processSteps.description: Dr. Rajeswari explains your specific results and whether LASIK is truly the right option -- no pressure, no upselling.

processSteps.title: The Procedure
processSteps.description: If suitable, the laser procedure itself takes only minutes per eye, with rapid visual recovery.
